bead.title: test: close mutation intent stale and approval safety gaps
bead.description:
Context: STP-105, STP-106, and STP-107 include untested P0 rows for preview determinism, direct-write approval interception, stale policy-version drift, operation-hash mismatch, multi-entity stale invalidation, and SDK/GraphQL outcome parity. These map directly to PRD FR-7 and FR-8.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-server/tests/graphql_intents_contract.rs`, intent handling in `crates/axon-api/` only if behavior is missing, and STP-105..107 markdown rows.
Out-of-scope: SDK implementation details except for documenting/deferring US-107-AC6 to the SDK bead if needed.
Implementation hint: assert no partial commit and explicit stale/mismatch dimensions: policy version, operation hash, and one-stale-entity invalidating a multi-entity intent.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_intents_contract` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-api` passes if API behavior changes.
3. The executable @covers scanner reports coverage for each STP-105..107 row closed by this bead.
4. STP rows are updated only with cited passing evidence.
